jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Toppr
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Toppr in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Toppr:
Toppr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr!
